summary: AI design, robotic fabrication, and on-site assembly for buildings.
editor_note: Construction robotics usually breaks between design software and the job site. Unlike prefab software, All3 is trying the harder route: AI-generated architecture, real-time fabrication software, timber components, and Mantis robots that install, fasten, finish, and inspect on site. The public pages claim 100+ in-house engineers and a cost-your-project flow, while TNW reports 100,000+ square meters processed for Germany. The risk is whether vertical integration survives permits and messy sites.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes All3: AI design, robotic fabrication, and on-site assembly for buildings.
